titleStmt.title: SII 20.127: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 127. (B.K. No. 34 of 1936-37.) KAḌLEVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Svāmiliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1108, Parābhava, Chaitra, Paurṇimā, Friday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1186, April 5. The weekday, however, was Saturday.

The inscription records a gift of income from taxes, etc., of the mēlāḷke-maṁneya of the village Nāvidige situated in the kaṁpaṇa of Kummasi-30 in Tarddavāḍi-1000 division, to god Svayaṁbhu Sōmanātha of Kaḍalevāḍa for worship, offerings, etc., by the king, who was camping at Gōkāge, in conjunction with mahāpasāyita Kumāra Bommidēvarasa, his maternal uncle Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Gōyindamayya, and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ānemarasa of Siḷāra family, who was governing Yeḷamēla. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Sōvarāsi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē ttraiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūḷastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvalabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhapravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire gō kāgeya nele
vīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatupādaṣaṭupatu . svasti sama
staprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatu rāyadaṁḍanātha gaṁḍapeṁḍāra śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ
sēnādhipati kaḷacuryyarājyanirmūḷanaḥ cāḷukyarājyasamuddharaṇaṁ siribirudamaṁ
ḍaḷikasarabhabhēruṁḍaṁ nuḍidaṁte gaṁḍa vīramārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa giridurggama
lla ripuhridayasella malavaraṁ kolva śaraṇene kāva śrī sōmanāthadēvara divya śrīpādārā
dhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ mahāpasāyitaṁ ku
māraṁ boṁmmidēvarasaruṁ Avara māvaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ gōyiṁdamayya
daṁḍanāyakaruṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabuda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ taga
ranagarādhīśvaraṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ sauryyaraghujātaṁ rājamāṁdhā
taṁ śrī śiḷāṟavaṁśōdbhavaṁ vibhavāmarēṁdraṁ ḍaṁgāṟabhērīnirgghōṣaṇaṁ
samaraikabhīṣaṇaṁ vidagudhamugudhāṁganāhridayakusumakōdaṁḍaṁ
kadanapracaṁḍaṁ ceṁnnamuṁnneyapaṁnnegavainatēya virōdhimaṁnneya tāra
kāsurakārtikēyanativiśamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvaṁtaṁ
vijayalakṣmīkāṁtaṁsuvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ mimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ kāttyāyanīdēvī labudhavara
prasādaṁ sahajamrigamadāmōdaṁ Āḷiṁ muṁnniṟivaṁ sauryyamaṁ
meṟevaṁ baṁṭara bāvaṁ maṟeUge kāvaṁ siṁganaṁkakāṟaṁ raṇaraṁganīṟaṁ ni
jada beḍaṁgaṁ śrīmaduttarēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmā
disamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Ānemarasaru yeḷamēlalu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu svasti śrī sakavarṣa 1108 neya parā
bhavasaṁvatsarada caitrada pauurṇnamāsye sukravāra sōmagrahaṇa puṁṇyatithi nimi
ttavāgi tarddavāḍisāsirada kaṁpaṇa kummasi mūvattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ nāvi
digeya mēlāḷke maṁnneyamumaṁ prabhutvada Arddhamāṁnya Aṣṭabhōgatējasāmya kāṇi
ke kiṟukuḷāya dāyasahitaṁ paṁcaka Aruvaṇa hiṭṭudeṟe ha
ledeṟe catussīmāghāṭadoḷagaṇa nidhi nidhāna nikṣēpa tarupathamāḷāvrikṣajalapāśā
ṇasahita yiṁtinituvaṁ tribhuvanamallasōmēśvaradēvanuṁ kumāraṁ baṁmmidēvarasa
nuṁ Āvara māvaṁ gōyiṁdamayyadaṁḍanāyakaruṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ānema
rasanuṁ yiṁtinibaruṁ tammoḷēkastarāgirddu Agastyamahāmunigaḷā śrīmaddakṣiṇa
vāraṇāsi kaḍalevāḍa(levāḍa)da svayaṁbhusōmanāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jī
rṇnōddhārakkaṁ tapōdhanara Āśanācchādanakkaṁ karppūrakuṁkumacaṁdanānulēpanakkaṁ svasti yama
niyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇajapasamā
dhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ vibudhajanamanōvāṁtsitaphaḷasamutpaṁnnaruṁ dīnānāthajaṭha radā
vapāvakanivāraṇa nijasamayaśaraṇaikarakṣadakṣananavaratasubhikṣitapaṁḍitacūḍāmaṇigaḷuṁ
śiṣṭajanaciṁtāmaṇigaḷappa kaḍalevāḍada śrīsvayaṁbhusōmanāthadēvara piriya maṭhadācāryya
sōvarāsipaṁḍitadēvara pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi tribhōgābhyaṁtara sarvvanamaśyavāgi
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
pūrvvadattānupālanātu pūrvvadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . madvaṁ
śajā paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhūmibhūpāḥ tē pālayaṁtu mama dha
rmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrddhani . brahmasvaṁ
yuddhakālē pralīyaṁtē kathaṁ yathā . svasti śrīmatu Ācāryya sātimayyaṁ
gaḷu nāvidigeya prabhu saṁbhudēvarasarggaṁ Avara prabhutvada guḍḍemānyadoḷage Ayinūṟayvattu
mattaru keyyuma maṁ yiṁtinitumaṁ sarvvabhādhāparihāravāgi
kādūḍuvaru yī mariyādeyalu sukhadalirpparu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
